Claim Of Right To Possession And Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CARLOS NELSON'S Claim Of Right To Possession And Notice Of Hearing.
APPEARANCE: Benjamin Elliot Kaplan, Esq. of Law Offices of Kaplan & Sam 447-8300 for pltf & opposing party; Carlos Nelson, 374-4680 moving party in propria persona.
RULING: Hearing held. Larry Rowe, registered process server, sworn and examined.
Plaintiff introduced the following exhibits for identification and were ordered received into evidence:
#1 Copy of registered process server's registration card - evid;
#2 Proof of service of summons - evid.
Argued and the Court denied Carlos Nelson's claim of right to possession. Order signed in open court. Plaintiff's exhibits withdrawn by counsel per Court's order. (301/EHG/ju) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489
